translation_findings.jp: つまり、結合テストではプログラム同士のインタフェースが合うか（きちんと接続できるか）を確認する。
translation_findings.zh: 也就是说，在集成测试中确认程序之间的接口是否匹配（能否正确连接）。
translation_findings.en: In other words, integration testing confirms whether the interfaces between programs match (whether they can be properly connected).
translation_findings.issue: Acceptable phrasing; 'match' is a slightly loose rendering of 'インタフェースが合う' (could be 'are compatible'). Not release-impacting.
translation_findings.suggested_fix: Optional: change 'match' -> 'are compatible' for greater precision.

narrative: Section title, table of test types, term 'Interface', and 3 figure captions all translated accurately. Table rows preserve specialized testing vocabulary (Unit/Integration/System/Operational Test) consistently. Term 'インタフェース' aligns with glossary (接口/Interface). Only a single LOW polish nit in en table cell.
